title: Fix lobby notification to post to Discord directly

log.context: Fix lobby notification to post to Discord directly

Done. Here's a summary of what changed:

**`/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts`**
Replaced the omni webhook call (`http://127.0.0.1:8085/webhooks/bigclungus-main`) with a direct Discord API POST to `https://discord.com/api/v10/channels/1485343472952148008/messages` using `Authorization: Bot ${token}`. Added a guard that warns to console if `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` is unset rather than silently failing.
